nativeProps: React.InputHTMLAttributes<HTMLInputElement>, excluding type, value, defaultValue, name, and native onChange

props.name: name
props.type: string; hidden canonical E.164 form name

props.name: extensionLabel
props.type: required localized string when extension is true

compositionPolicy.native: One real type=tel input owns editing, selection, undo, paste, autocomplete, validation, and focus; no browser or editor key is intercepted.
compositionPolicy.adapter: A required trusted synchronous adapter owns country-aware parsing, display formatting, exact validity, canonical E.164 output, and caret mapping. The component loads no numbering database or remote adapter.
compositionPolicy.country: Country context requires localized text containing letters or numbers plus an isolated calling code; flag-only labels fail at runtime.
compositionPolicy.forms: Visible formatted phone text has no form name. An optional hidden control serializes only valid canonical E.164 output, while an optional separately labelled extension input serializes independently.
compositionPolicy.field: ID, label, description, error, required, and invalid relationships are inherited from Field unless explicitly supplied.
